a2a:agent-card.a2a:json: { "protocolVersion": "0.3.0", "name": "atelier-org-agent", "description": "組織/人事担当 AI エージェント (Atelier 用 同期 A2A 版)。バイヤー検索 / 承認依頼送信を LLM tool-use ループで実施し、統合サマリを返す。リスクスコア更新・KG 記録は対象外 (legal-agent 経路)。", "url": "${agent.public.url}", "version": "1.0.0", "preferredTransport": "JSONRPC", "capabilities": { "streaming": false, "pushNotifications": false, "stateTransitionHistory": false }, "defaultInputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "defaultOutputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "skills": [ { "id": "org_handle_incident", "name": "組織/人事インシデント対応 (LLM tool-use)", "description": "サプライヤー品質インシデント連絡を自然文で受け取り、調達担当バイヤー検索 / 承認依頼送信 を tool-use ループで実施し、統合サマリを返す。", "examples": [ "INC-2026-0521 関西部品 (G-KANSAI-PARTS-001) の調達担当者を見つけて承認依頼を出してほしい。" ], "inputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "outputModes": ["text/plain", "application/json"], "tags": ["org", "hr", "approval"] } ] }

logger.message: #['atelier-org-agent A2A task received. method=' ++ (attributes.jsonRpcMethod default '?') ++ ' taskId=' ++ (attributes.taskId default '?')]

ee:transform.doc:name: extract user text + task ids + contextId

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((attributes.taskId default (now() as String)) as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var fromAttr = (attributes.contextId default "") as String var fromMsg = (p.message.contextId default "") as String --- if (fromAttr != "") fromAttr else fromMsg

%dw 2.0 output application/java var p = if (payload is String) read(payload, "application/json") else payload var dataParts = ((p.message.parts default []) filter ((x) -> (x.kind default x."type" default "") == "data")) --- if (sizeOf(dataParts) > 0) (dataParts[0].data default null) else null

logger.message: #['org-agent: directPart=' ++ (if (vars.directPart != null) 'yes' else 'no') ++ ' userText=' ++ ((vars.userText default '') as String)]

choice.doc:name: broker direct (data part) か 人間 自然文か

logger.message: #['org intent pipeline failed: ' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "⚠️ atelier-org-agent: 処理中にエラーが発生しました。\n" ++ " " ++ ((error.description default (error.message default "unknown")) as String)

%dw 2.0
output application/java
var t = ((vars.finalText default "") as String)
var msgs = (vars.messages default [])
var lastAssistant = (msgs filter ((m) -> ((m.role default "") as String) == "assistant" and ((m.content default "") as String) != ""))
var lastAssistantContent = if (sizeOf(lastAssistant) > 0) ((lastAssistant[-1].content default "") as String) else ""
var fallbackByReason =
  if ((vars.finishReason default "") as String == "length")
    "ℹ️ 組織・人事 (atelier-org-agent) です。

回答が文字数上限に達しました。
部署名・役割・インシデント ID のいずれかを指定して再度お試しください。"
  else
    "ℹ️ 組織・人事 (atelier-org-agent) です。

**実行可能な操作**
- 取引先のゴールデン ID 解決
- 過去インシデント・取引先関係の照会
- 取引先一覧 (region / status / リスクスコア範囲で絞込み)
- 取引先 region 一覧 (各 region の件数付き)
- 担当バイヤーの検索 (category / region)
- 承認依頼の Slack DM 送信

**対象外** (依頼されても実施しません): サプライヤーリスクスコア更新 / KG (オントロジー) 記録 / 法務契約照会 / 在庫照会 / 発注ドラフト / インシデント採番。

お手数ですが部署名・役割・インシデント ID のいずれかを指定してください。"
---
if (t != "") t
else if (lastAssistantContent != "") lastAssistantContent
else fallbackByReason
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 0
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ""
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java var sysPrompt = "あなたは組織/人事担当 AI (atelier-org-agent)。専門領域は HR (担当者検索・承認依頼) のみ。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 0: メタ質問 (scope / capability) は STEP 1 を飛ばして自然文で答える ===
" ++ "
" ++ "ユーザが「何ができる?」「インシデント登録もできる?」「君の役割は?」のようなツール実行を伴わない質問をしてきたら、 NEED_INFO ゲートを発動せず、 1〜3 行の自然文で簡潔に答える。
" ++ " - できる: 最適バイヤー検索 (category / region 指定) / 承認依頼の送信。
" ++ " - できない (担当外): インシデント起票 (incident-agent) / 法務 (legal-agent) / 在庫 (logistics-agent) / 発注 (procurement-agent) / supplier・part の正規化 ID 解決 (broker または MDM)。
" ++ " → 担当外の依頼は、 担当する agent に直接話すか broker に投げてもらうよう案内する。
" ++ "
" ++ "具体的に人事関連のツール実行を頼まれたときだけ、 STEP 1 のゲートに進む。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 1: 最優先 — NEED_INFO ゲート (ツール実行依頼に対してのみ発動。 違反する出力は重大エラー) ===
" ++ "
" ++ "次のいずれかが揃っていなければ、 何があっても tool を呼ばず、 ADVISORY/EXECUTE テンプレも一切書かず、 [NEED_INFO] block だけを返す:
" ++ " - find_best_buyer に必要なもの: category (Mechanical/Electronics 等) と region (JP-KANSAI 等) の少なくとも一方。 サプライヤー名や部品名から推測してはいけない。
" ++ " - send_approval_request に必要なもの: 承認対象 (approverEmployeeId または resolved buyer) と incidentId (INC-XXXX 形式採番済)。
" ++ "
" ++ " **絶対禁止例 (これらは重大エラー)**:
" ++ " - サプライヤー名「関西部品」を見て region="JP-KANSAI" を勝手に決める → ❌
" ++ " - 部品名「ハンドル部品」を見て category="Mechanical" を勝手に決める → ❌
" ++ " - supplierGoldenId が無いのに G-XXX 形式 ID を作る → ❌
" ++ " - 不足を埋めずに ADVISORY テーブルに値を埋めて返す → ❌
" ++ "
" ++ "NEED_INFO 出力フォーマット (これだけを返す。 他のテキスト/テーブル/絵文字は書かない):
" ++ "
" ++ " [NEED_INFO]
" ++ " - <question 1 — ユーザの最後のメッセージと同じ言語で書く。 日本語で来たら日本語で問い返す。 normalized ID or value を要求すること>
" ++ " - <question 2 ...>
" ++ " [/NEED_INFO]
" ++ "
" ++ "自分のドメイン外 (supplier ID 解決、 region/category 解決、 在庫、 法務、 発注、 インシデント採番) も同じ方式で [NEED_INFO] を返す。
" ++ "上位 (broker または人間) が解決して回答したら、 その値を使って自分の tool を実行する。
" ++ "
" ++ "=== STEP 2: 全項目揃った場合のみ — 通常の処理 ===
" ++ "
" ++ "利用可能 tool: find_best_buyer / send_approval_request のみ。
" ++ "
" ++ "動作モード: ADVISORY
" ++ " - 基本は「候補担当者を提示して、 推奨アクションを箇条書き」。
" ++ " - send_approval_request は **ユーザが明示的に「実行して」「承認依頼送って」と指示したときだけ** 実行する。
" ++ "
" ++ "tool の引数は user メッセージの固有名詞をそのまま使う。「unknown」「placeholder」は絶対不可。
" ++ "
" ++ "tool 戻り値:
" ++ " - find_best_buyer → result.buyers[i].employeeId / .employeeName / .category / .region
" ++ " - send_approval_request → result.approvalRequestId / result.dueAt
" ++ "
" ++ "出力フォーマット:
" ++ " [ADVISORY] 👥 org-agent: <一言サマリ> / 候補 <employeeName>(<employeeId>) <category>/<region> / 推奨: <理由>
" ++ " [EXECUTE] 👥 org-agent: <実行サマリ> / 担当 <employeeName>(<employeeId>) / 承認依頼 <approvalRequestId> 期限 <dueAt>" --- if ((vars.priorMessages default []) != []) (vars.priorMessages default []) ++ [{ role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String }] else [ { role: "system", content: sysPrompt }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- 1 to (p('agent.max_loops') as Number)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload default 0) - 1) as Number

logger.message: #['Agent loop done. iterations=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: vars.messages default [], tools: vars.tools default [], tool_choice: "auto" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].finish_reason) default "") as String
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [(((payload default {}).choices default [])[0].message) default { role: "assistant", content: "" }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.assistantMsg.content default "") as String)

logger.message: #['Loop iter=' ++ (vars.loopCount as String) ++ ' finishReason=' ++ (vars.finishReason default '') ++ ' tool_calls=' ++ ((sizeOf(vars.assistantMsg.tool_calls default []) as String))]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload."id" default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.name default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((payload.function.arguments default "{}") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- read((vars.toolArgsRaw default "{}") as String, "application/json")
%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "find_best_buyer" or n == "send_approval_request") "hr" else "unknown"

%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.messages default []) ++ [{ role: "tool", tool_call_id: (vars.toolCallId default "") as String, content: write((vars.toolResult default {}), "application/json") as String }]
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.actionsLog default []) ++ [{ tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }]

choice.doc:name: 埋め込みJSON か 自然文か

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java var sys = "あなたは組織・人事 agent の『意図抽出器』です。 ユーザの 1 メッセージを読み、 下記 JSON だけを出力。 説明やコードフェンスは書かない。
" ++ "
" ++ "scope: "org" (担当者検索・承認依頼) | "list_suppliers" (取引先一覧の照会) | "capability" | "out_of_scope"
" ++ " - "org" : 担当バイヤー/担当者を探す、 承認依頼を出す。
" ++ " - "list_suppliers" : 取引先(サプライヤー)の一覧を見たい。 「取引先一覧」「サプライヤー一覧」「〇〇地域の取引先」「リスクの高い取引先」等。 region/status/リスクで絞れる。
" ++ " - "out_of_scope" : 上記以外は全部これ。 特に → 法務・契約・返品請求・ペナルティ (legal) / 代替部品・発注・発注ドラフト (procurement) / 在庫・仮確保 (logistics) / インシデント起票 (incident)。
" ++ " ※ 文中に取引先名・部品番号・インシデントID が出てきても、 依頼の動詞が「担当者を探す/承認依頼を出す/取引先一覧を見る」でなければ out_of_scope。 entities に釣られて org にしない。
" ++ "mode : "advise" (適任の担当バイヤーを探すだけ) | "execute" (承認依頼を送信まで明示依頼: 「承認依頼を出して」「依頼して」「送って」)
" ++ "
" ++ "entities は読めた値だけ。 null 可。 推測禁止。
" ++ " region (例:九州) / category (例:機械部品) / incidentId (INC-...) / partNumber (P-...) / status (ACTIVE/INACTIVE 等)
" ++ "
" ++ "出力: {"scope":"...","mode":"advise","entities":{"region":null,"category":null,"incidentId":null,"partNumber":null,"status":null},"rawMessage":"原文"}" --- [ { role: "system", content: sys }, { role: "user", content: "九州の機械部品の担当バイヤーに承認依頼を出して。INC-2026-0579" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "org", mode: "execute", entities: { region: "九州", category: "機械部品", incidentId: "INC-2026-0579", partNumber: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "機械部品の担当者は誰?" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "org", mode: "advise", entities: { region: null, category: "機械部品", incidentId: null, partNumber: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "九州地域の取引先一覧を見せて" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "list_suppliers", mode: "advise", entities: { region: "九州", category: null, incidentId: null, partNumber: null, status: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "リスクの高いサプライヤーを教えて" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "list_suppliers", mode: "advise", entities: { region: null, category: null, incidentId: null, partNumber: null, status: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "何ができる?" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "capability", mode: "advise", entities: { region: null, category: null, incidentId: null, partNumber: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "在庫を仮確保して" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { region: null, category: null, incidentId: null, partNumber: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "品質保証協定で返品請求できるか法務的に見て" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { region: null, category: null, incidentId: null, partNumber: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: "代替部品の発注ドラフトを作って" }, { role: "assistant", content: write({ scope: "out_of_scope", mode: "advise", entities: { region: null, category: null, incidentId: null, partNumber: null }, rawMessage: "" }, "application/json") }, { role: "user", content: (vars.userText default "") as String } ]

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { model: (p('llm.model') default "gpt-5-mini") as String, max_completion_tokens: (p('llm.max_tokens') default 2048) as Number, messages: (vars.extractMessages default []) }

logger.message: #['org-agent scope=' ++ (vars.intent.scope default '?') ++ ' mode=' ++ (vars.intent.mode default '?') ++ ' entities=' ++ write(vars.intent.entities default {}, 'application/json')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "👥 組織・人事 (atelier-org-agent) です。

**できること**
- 適任の担当バイヤー検索 (region / category)
- 承認依頼の送信 (Slack DM)
- 取引先(サプライヤー)一覧の照会 (region / status / リスクスコアで絞込み)

**担当外**: インシデント (incident) / 法務 (legal) / 発注 (procurement) / 在庫 (logistics)。"
#['list_suppliers']

%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.intent.entities default {} --- { limit: 20 } ++ (if (e.region != null) { region: e.region } else {}) ++ (if (e.status != null) { status: e.status } else {})

%dw 2.0 output application/java var r = (vars.toolResult.result default vars.toolResult default {}) var items = (r.suppliers default r.items default []) fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- if (sizeOf(items) == 0) "👥 組織・人事: 条件に合う取引先は見つかりませんでした。" else ("👥 組織・人事 (取引先一覧 " ++ (sizeOf(items) as String) ++ "件)

" ++ "| GoldenId | 取引先 | region | status | リスク |
|---|---|---|---|---|
" ++ (items map ((s) -> "| **" ++ cell(s.goldenId default s.supplierGoldenId) ++ "** | " ++ cell(s.name default s.supplierName) ++ " | " ++ cell(s.region) ++ " | " ++ cell(s.status) ++ " | " ++ cell(s.riskScore) ++ " |" ) joinBy "
"))
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- "その依頼は組織・人事 agent の担当外です。\nインシデントは incident、 法務は legal、 発注は procurement、 在庫は logistics、 もしくは broker へ。"
#['find_best_buyer']
%dw 2.0 output application/java var e = vars.intent.entities default {} --- {} ++ (if (e.region != null) { region: e.region } else {}) ++ (if (e.category != null) { category: e.category } else {})
%dw 2.0 output application/java var b = ((vars.toolResult.result default {}).buyers default []) --- if (sizeOf(b) > 0) b[0] else null

when.expression: #[(vars.buyer default null) == null and ((vars.intent.entities.region default null) != null or (vars.intent.entities.category default null) != null)]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: #['find_best_buyer']
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- {}
%dw 2.0 output application/java var b = ((vars.toolResult.result default {}).buyers default []) --- if (sizeOf(b) > 0) b[0] else null

logger.message: org buyer 1st pass OK or no filter

when.expression: #[(vars.intent.mode default "advise") == "execute" and (vars.buyer default null) != null and (vars.intent.entities.incidentId default null) != null]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: #['send_approval_request']

%dw 2.0 output application/java var r = (vars.toolResult.result default vars.toolResult default {}) var b = vars.buyer default {} fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- "👥 組織エージェント (実行完了)

" ++ "| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
" ++ "| 担当バイヤー | **" ++ cell(b.name default b.employeeName) ++ "** (" ++ cell(b.employeeId) ++ ") |
" ++ "| 承認依頼 | **" ++ cell(r.approvalRequestId default r.approvalId) ++ "** |
" ++ "| 期限 | " ++ cell(r.dueAt) ++ " |"

%dw 2.0 output application/java var b = vars.buyer default null fun cell(v) = if (v == null or (v as String) == "") "—" else (v as String) --- if (b == null) "👥 組織エージェント: 条件に合う担当バイヤーが見つかりませんでした。 region / category を指定してください。" else ("👥 組織エージェント (担当者検索)

" ++ "| 項目 | 値 |
|---|---|
" ++ "| 担当バイヤー | **" ++ cell(b.name default b.employeeName) ++ "** (" ++ cell(b.employeeId) ++ ") |
" ++ "| 役割 | " ++ cell(b.role) ++ " |
" ++ "| 地域 / カテゴリ | " ++ cell(b.region) ++ " / " ++ cell(b.category) ++ " |

" ++ "incidentId を添えて「承認依頼を出して」で送信します。")
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- ((vars.directPart.tool default vars.directPart.toolName default "") as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- (vars.directPart.args default vars.directPart."input" default {})

%dw 2.0 output application/java var n = (vars.directPart.tool default vars.directPart.toolName default "") as String --- if (n == "find_best_buyer" or n == "send_approval_request") "hr" else "unknown"

logger.message: #['org-agent direct fast-path: tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' args=' ++ write(vars.toolArgs default {}, 'application/json')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write({ status: "error", agent: "atelier-org-agent", mode: "direct", result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "unsupported tool for direct mode: " ++ (vars.toolName default ""), supported: ["find_best_buyer","send_approval_request"] } }, "application/json") as String

ee:transform.doc:name: wrap direct result as JSON reply

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write({ status: "ok", agent: "atelier-org-agent", mode: "direct", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: (vars.toolResult default {}) }, "application/json") as String

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { toolName: (vars.toolName default "") as String, "input": (vars.toolArgs default {}) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "UNKNOWN_TOOL", message: "no MCP for tool: " ++ (vars.toolName default "") } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { status: "error", tool: (vars.toolName default "") as String, result: { code: "MCP_CALL_FAILED", message: (error.description default error.message default "unknown") as String } }

logger.message: #['MCP call failed kind=' ++ (vars.mcpKind default '') ++ ' tool=' ++ (vars.toolName default '') ++ ' err=' ++ (error.description default error.message default 'unknown')]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

%dw 2.0 output application/java fun parseList(s) = if (s == null or s == "") [] else read(s, "application/json") --- if (vars.priorRaw == null) [] else if (vars.priorRaw is String) parseList(vars.priorRaw as String) else (vars.priorRaw default [])
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- []

logger.message: #['memory load: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' priorMessages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.priorMessages default []) as String)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- write((vars.messages default []), "application/json") as String

logger.message: #['memory save: contextId=' ++ (vars.contextId default '') ++ ' messages=' ++ (sizeOf(vars.messages default []) as String)]
